summary: The diff implements all three requirements. REQ-25 is addressed in RegistrationScreen.tsx (mutateAsync, inline error handling, button disabled state) and useQueries.ts (throws on authenticationError). REQ-26 is addressed in App.tsx (justRegistered flag, setQueryData cache population). REQ-27 is addressed in backend/main.mo (ok/err variants, duplicate checks, principal mapping). All acceptance criteria appear to be covered.
